Periplus. The Mnrkandeyapurvna (LVII. 39) places the Barbara

The Caficukas are identified by some with the Chenchus, a hill
tribe, living in the Srl^ailam area of Andhra Pradesh.
Hemagiri may be identical with Kanakagiri near Mysore.
Raivataka is a hill opposite Mt. Girnar. Sometimes it is identi-
fied with the Girnar mountain itself, which is believed to be birth-
place of Neminatha and regarded as one of the five great Tirthas
of the Jainas. In the Junagadh inscription of Skandagupta, it is
said to be the source of the river Palasini.
Sura$\ra corresponds to the Kathiawad peninsula. Surat is a
corruption of this name. The author of the Periplus calls it Syras-
trene.
